packs.name: Budget Tracker
packs.description: Monthly income / expense / savings ledger with category totals. Pencil-friendly, no app required.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Cornell Notes
packs.description: The canonical Cornell layout — cue column, notes pane, summary zone. Rule-honest, no flourish.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Eat the Frog
packs.description: Brian Tracy's Eat That Frog! — one big frog box, three secondary task boxes, a reflection line.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Eisenhower Matrix
packs.description: Urgent / important quadrant grid with room to write tasks, not just categorise them.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Fitness Log
packs.description: Sets, reps, weights, cardio — a no-nonsense workout log that survives contact with real training.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Goal Setting
packs.description: One-page SMART goal layout with milestone ladder and a review prompt. Start once, finish once.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Gratitude Journal
packs.description: A five-line gratitude rhythm for daily practice — small prompts, plenty of writing space.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Habit Tracker
packs.description: Monthly habit grid — one row per habit, one column per day, filled dots for completion.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Meal Planning
packs.description: Weekly meal grid + shopping list column on one A4. Plan Monday, shop once, cook calmly.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Meeting Notes
packs.description: Attendees / agenda / decisions / actions in fixed zones. Prints on one A4 page per meeting.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Monthly Planner
packs.description: Full-month grid with a notes column. Standalone or as the monthly review inside a bigger planner.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Mood Tracker
packs.description: Monthly mood dot grid with a legend strip. Useful data without demanding journaling.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Morning Pages
packs.description: Julia Cameron's three-page longhand rhythm. One ruled A4 sheet sized to carry the discipline.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Praxis Ledger
packs.description: A 130-page bound journal that prints like an edition and plans like a system. Themeable.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Project Planning
packs.description: Scope / risks / milestones / next-actions in fixed blocks. Project on one page.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Prompted Journal
packs.description: Dated pages with rotating prompts across the week — writing you can show up to without deciding first.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Reading Log
packs.description: Title / author / started / finished / rating / note. One line per book, one year per sheet.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Recipe Card
packs.description: A5-sized recipe card with ingredients, method, notes. Print, write, cook, stain, keep.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Reflection Journal
packs.description: End-of-day reflection layout with space for wins, what shifted, and a one-line summary.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Simple Pages
packs.description: Six utility A4 pages in one PDF — lined, grid, dot-grid, blank, isometric, and music-staff. Cream paper, warm analog palette.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Tactile Daily Planner
packs.description: Claymorphic A4 daily planner with binder rings, time-block schedule, mood + hydration + movement widgets, and a gratitude cloud.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Tactile Habit Tracker
packs.description: Claymorphic A4 monthly habit tracker — habit-of-the-month spotlight, 8 habits × 31 days of soft-clay cells, washi accents, binder spine.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Tactile Evening Reflections
packs.description: Claymorphic A4 evening journal — lined brain-dump canvas plus three prompt cards (Highlights, Learned, For Tomorrow). Washi date tape.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Tactile Tasks & Notes
packs.description: Claymorphic A4 tasks + notes — three priority cards, soft-clay to-do checkboxes, Important callout, lined Brain Dump canvas, washi accents.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Travel Planner
packs.description: Trip-in-a-page: dates / route / stays / packing / budget. Fold it, tuck it, travel with it.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Weekly Planner
packs.description: Mon-start weekly spread with intention + review. Enough structure to be useful, no more.
packs.author: prax

packs.name: Yearly Overview
packs.description: Twelve-month on one page. Year-at-a-glance for dating spreads, goals, and anchors.
packs.author: prax
